title: How to enable platform-wide free AI experiences?
excerpt:
How do you enable these AI features? I’m using Enterprise and have reached out to our CSM, Account Manager, and Support, but no one has been able to help me. 
I’ve enabled AI permissions in Permissions, Workspaces, and B…

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do you enable these AI features? I’m using Enterprise and have reached out to our CSM, Account Manager, and Support, but no one has been able to help me.

I’ve enabled AI permissions in Permissions, Workspaces, and Boards.

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/24047211522194-AI-Credits-and-Permissions?lid=22zgjw8ta0ta#what_are_ai_credits:~:text=Platform-wide%20free%20AI%20experiences

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
They should auto be active if you’ve turned on those settings. This is what the filter with AI looks like -

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the screenshot! Unfortunately, it doesn’t auto-activate for me. I’ll try reaching out again.
